mobs.name: Steve
sentences: Steve is the default player character.
He wears a blue shirt and jeans.
He can mine blocks and craft tools.
He can build houses and fight monsters.
You play as Steve when you start the game.

mobs.name: Creeper
sentences: The Creeper is a green four-legged monster.
It is silent and does not make noise.
It explodes when it gets close to you.
It is the most famous Minecraft monster.
Be careful! The Creeper can destroy your builds.

mobs.name: Zombie
sentences: The Zombie is a green undead creature.
It walks toward you slowly.
It burns in sunlight.
It appears at night.
It can break down wooden doors.

mobs.name: Skeleton
sentences: The Skeleton is an undead creature with a bow.
It shoots arrows at you from far away.
It burns in sunlight.
It is hard to fight from close range.
Find cover to avoid its arrows.

mobs.name: Enderman
sentences: The Enderman is a tall black creature.
It has purple eyes.
It can teleport from place to place.
Do not look at its eyes or it will attack.
It is very strong and dangerous.

mobs.name: Villager
sentences: The Villager is a friendly non-player character.
They live in villages.
You can trade items with them.
They have different jobs like farmer or librarian.
They make funny sounds when they talk.

mobs.name: Cow
sentences: The Cow is a friendly animal.
It gives you leather when you defeat it.
You can get beef from cows for food.
You can milk cows with a bucket.
Cows are easy to find in grassy areas.

mobs.name: Wolf
sentences: The Wolf is a wild animal you can tame.
Give it bones to make it your dog.
Dogs fight monsters for you.
Wild wolves attack if you hit them.
Tamed wolves are loyal and helpful.

mobs.name: Ender Dragon
sentences: The Ender Dragon is the final boss.
It lives in a place called The End.
It is very strong and hard to defeat.
Defeating it is the main goal of the game.
You need good armor and weapons to fight it.

mobs.name: Cat
sentences: The Cat is a small friendly animal.
You can tame cats with fish.
Cats scare away Creepers.
They come in many different colors.
Cats like to sit on beds and chests.
